title: User Authentication - Login Flow
description: Test user login functionality and authentication flow
steps: Verify login form is present with email and password fields
Verify successful login and redirect to dashboard

title: User Authentication - Logout Flow
description: Test user logout functionality
steps: Navigate to user menu or logout option

title: Security Dashboard Loading
description: Test main dashboard loads correctly with all components
steps: Verify dashboard title 'Security Dashboard' is visible
Verify stats cards display (Total Alerts, Critical Threats, URL Scans, Email Scans)
Check that threat intelligence feed is present
Verify backend status component is visible

title: Dashboard Refresh Functionality
description: Test dashboard refresh button functionality
steps: Locate and click the refresh button

title: URL Analysis Page Navigation
description: Test navigation to URL analysis page and form validation
steps: Verify URL input form is present
Test URL input field accepts text
Test form validation with invalid URLs

title: Email Inspection Page Navigation
description: Test navigation to email inspection page
steps: Verify email analysis form is present
Check for email headers input field

title: Network Monitoring Page Navigation
description: Test navigation to network monitoring page and visualization
steps: Verify file upload section for PCAP files
Verify charts and graphs are present

title: Threat Intelligence Page Navigation
description: Test threat intelligence lookup functionality
steps: Check indicator type selector (IP, domain, URL, hash)

title: File Analysis Page Navigation
description: Test file analysis page and upload functionality

title: Threats Page Navigation
description: Test threat alerts management page

title: Analytics Page Navigation
description: Test analytics and reporting page
steps: Check for analytics charts and graphs

title: Settings Page Navigation
description: Test settings and configuration page

title: Main Navigation Menu Testing
description: Test all navigation links and menu functionality
steps: Verify main navigation menu is visible
Test each navigation link (Dashboard, URL Analysis, Email Inspection, etc.)

title: Responsive Design Testing
description: Test application responsiveness across different screen sizes

title: Form Validation Testing
description: Test form validation across different pages
steps: Test URL analysis form with invalid URLs
Test email inspection with malformed data

title: Loading States and Error Handling
description: Test loading indicators and error handling throughout the application
steps: Test loading states during form submissions
Verify error handling for network failures
Check loading indicators on data fetch

title: Accessibility Testing
description: Test application accessibility features
steps: Test keyboard navigation using Tab key
Check ARIA labels on interactive elements

title: Backend Integration Testing
description: Test integration with backend services
steps: Test API error handling when backend is unavailable
Check scan result storage and retrieval

title: Performance Testing
description: Test application performance and load times

title: Security Features Testing
description: Test security-related features and protections
steps: Test protected route access without authentication
